title: Audiometry Mission and Vision
content:
Audiometry Mission and Vision

Mission

To train qualified audiometry technicians who have adequate training, knowledge and application skills about the diagnosis of disease which cause hearing loss and vestibular impairment, can follow technological developments in the field and adapt to changing conditions, constantly improve themselves, adhere to ethical values, respect patient rights and have verbal communication skills.

Vision

To be a reliable higher education program with the prestigious and accepted nationally and internationally , whose graduates are preferred by the business world, follow innovations and are equipped with qualified and self-confident individuals suitable for the needs of the age, contribute to science and social development, take pride in being within the organization and take the first place in student preferences.
